hypothesis: If yield curve slope divergence is valid, the bounded tests should improve the motivating diagnostic without weakening Gold Status economics. Rationale: Evaluates if sudden bull-steepening in the 2s10s yield curve acts as a reliable exit signal for long-duration growth stocks.
stop_conditions: drift is not reproducible from point-in-time snapshots
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Strategy goes to cash and misses more than 20% of a subsequent tech rally.
